usage: Persist this file inside your repositories as .codescene/custom-quality-gates.json

rule_sets.matching_content_path_doc: No gates on test files — large methods and duplication are expected in tests.

Production code: critical + advisory rules + hotspot decline enabled. new_code_health is disabled because it requires a perfect 10.0 score on every new file — too strict for an established codebase where scores of 9.7-9.9 are acceptable. Revisit once the codebase baseline is well-understood. refactoring_goals and supervise_goals are disabled until Goals are configured in the CodeScene UI.
